archetype: High-Contrast Tactical Lab (Archetype 2 / Swiss High-Contrast hybrid)

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Dense but scannable. Mobile-first layout emphasizing large tap targets and vertical scroll.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Responsive Sidebar: Hidden on mobile (use hamburger drawer or bottom nav). Sticky sidebar on desktop that can collapse to icon-only view.
layout_and_spacing.cards: bg-[#161b15] border border-[#2b3628] rounded-xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#a3e635] text-[#0d100c] hover:bg-[#84cc16] font-semibold rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#f8fafc] border border-[#2b3628] hover:bg-[#1f261e] font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-[#94a3b8] hover:text-[#f8fafc] hover:bg-[#1f261e] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-transparent text-[#ef4444] border border-[#ef4444]/30 hover:bg-[#ef4444]/10 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

culture_card.structure: Top: Flex-between (Species Name as H4, Status Badge). Middle: Grid of details (Culture Type, Location, Created Date). Bottom: Action bar (Print Label, Child Culture, Add Event icon buttons).
culture_card.id_display_rule: Culture IDs should be displayed in a subtle monospace format (e.g., text-xs text-muted) to de-emphasize raw test IDs like PTEST/CTEST, while still keeping them available for reference.

components.status_badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) on desktop hover with a subtle glow shadow. Buttons use swift color transitions (duration-150).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion fade in and slide up (opacity 0 to 1, y 10 to 0) on component mount.
motion_and_interactions.list_animations: Staggered entrance for culture cards in the grid.

media.login_background_description: Dark abstract biological background with wavy green lines, to be used behind a glassmorphic login panel with high blur.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio. The primary lime green (#a3e635) against dark charcoal (#0d100c) provides extremely high contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive and informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-culture-btn', data-testid='culture-card-{id}').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI using React (JSX) and Tailwind CSS.
Configure Tailwind with the exact color hex codes provided in this JSON.
Use the 'Outfit' font for all text.
Implement a collapsible sidebar navigation for Admin and Operator roles (different links per role). Ensure it behaves well on mobile (hamburger menu/drawer).
Remove the 'Made with Emergent' badge completely.
Build the Cultures List as a responsive Grid of Cards (Bento style). DO NOT use standard table rows for cultures.
For the Culture Card: prominently feature the Species and Culture Type. Format raw IDs like 'PTEST123' as '#PT-123' or relegate them to a subtle gray tag so they aren't 'ugly'.
Ensure standard buttons are prominent: 'Add Culture', 'Add Event', 'Print Label', 'Create Child Culture'.
For Add Culture / Create Child Culture forms: Use proper dropdowns for Species, Location, Recipe, Parent ID. Create Child Culture should pre-fill the parent ID.
Culture Detail page must have a timeline view of CultureEvents and clearly show lineage.
Use Shadcn UI components (or raw Tailwind) but strictly theme them to the dark charcoal/lime aesthetic. Go border-heavy with #2b3628 and flat #161b15 backgrounds rather than pure black.
Leverage framer-motion for smooth page mounts and sonner for toast notifications.
Use lucide-react icons extensively for navigation and card metadata (e.g., Leaf, Thermometer, MapPin, Fingerprint, Calendar, Activity).
